You said I have not worked since November 2004 and
earned a single cent. No wonder, Because:

Birth Time Rectification Example (Case Study) 101
If starting from Moon : 4-10-2004 to 28-03-2006 (Mo
Ra)
Ra is the enemy of Moon and everything gets ecliptic,
especially mind/mood/partnership/helps etc. If starting from
Lagna: 17-02-2004 to 30-06-2006. (Ju-Ra)
Rahu is the other part of Ke - See how complementary is
Ju-Ke and Mo-Ra are in the Rasi chart.
Why this Mo-Ra combination should affect Job
especially?
Even though Moon is in V argothama, and Ju in friendly
sign, Ra is posited in the enemy sign and its Navamsa is in
the enemy sign of sun (in 8th house which indicates problems
in life). Also see that Ve the lOth lord (job) also gets afflicted
by Rain 3rd. If one is counting houses from Mo then Ju is the
lOth lord and see that Ju also gets afflicted by Ra. The
importance of Mo, Ju, Rain relation to job is evident in the
